expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜板材尺寸。[宽度]、[高度]、[深度]为整体尺寸，[板厚]为顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[背板厚度]为背板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Lebar], [Tinggi], [Dalam] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [KetebalanPapan] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [KetebalanBelakang] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang.(AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Lebar], [Tinggi], [Kedalaman] adalah pengukuran total, [KetebalanPapan] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [KetebalanBelakang] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang.(AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นสำหรับตู้ [ความกว้าง], [ความสูง],[ความลึก] เป็นขนาดรวมทั้งหมด, [ความหนาแผ่น] เป็นความหนาวัสดุของแผ่นบน, แผ่นล่าง และแผ่นด้านข้าง, [ความหนาแผ่นหลัง] เป็นความหนาวัสดุของแผ่นหลังตู้(AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Chiều rộng], [Chiều cao], [Độ sâu] là kích thước tổng thể, [Độ dày bảng] là độ dày vật liệu của tấm trên, dưới và bên, [Độ dày bảng lưng] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng lưng.(AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang laki ng mga tabla para sa kabinet. [Lapad], [Taas], [Lalim] ay kabuuang Sukatan, [TablaTiktik] ay Kapal ng Tabla sa Itaas, Ibaba, at Gilid, [TablaLikodTiktik] ay Kapal ng Material ng Likurang Tabla.(AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ဘေးမှုးလှည်းအခန်းအတွင်းမှ အလျားအကျယ်၊ အမြင့်အနက်တို့ကို ခန့်မှန်းတွက်ချက်ပေးသည်။ [အလျားကျယ်]၊ [အမြင့်]၊[အနက်] သည်၊ ရေတွက်ချက်ထားသော အတိုင်းအတိုင်းဖြစ်သည်။(AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាប្លង់សម្រាប់ទូ [ទទឹង], [កំពស់],[ជម្រៅ] ជាវិមាត្រសរុប [ទទឹង], [ជម្រៅ], [កំពស់])-AI yet in-output
